positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical geometric illustration of a cosmic, abstract woodland scene. The main subject is a cluster of ancient, stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna integrated with constellations. Use clean vector lines and strong silhouettes reminiscent of mid-century modern design and Art Deco style. The color palette must feature deep indigo, electric cyan, neon magenta, and deep emerald green, contrasted against a rich, midnight black background. Composition must be centered, utilizing radial symmetry. Emphasize patterns, repeating geometric motifs, and high contrast for optimal apparel printing. Flat graphic design aesthetic, perfect for repeating tile patterns.
negative: blurry, photorealistic, gradient, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, poor symmetry, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cinematic, HDR, muddy colors
